name: Caesar Mayo Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop and mash the anchovy fillets on a cutting board.
2. Add the mashed anchovies to a bowl with 1 1/2 cups of mayonnaise.
3. Mix in the Dijon mustard, Parmesan cheese, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, and black pepper.
4. Blend well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
5. Cover the mixture and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip
Suggested dippers: Seafood, Deli Roast Beef or Turkey, Radishes, Broccoli, Cauliflower, Snow Peas
